events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求生成一个JSON响应。场景是商业建筑的电气灯具安装，材料阶段(staged)，包装密封但额定值面朝下，图纸要求特定尺寸或等级，但提交的证据没有显示标记。参考NEC 410。任务是评估现场条件并返回适当的决策。我们需要选择决策：pass/fail/needs_more_info。由于无法验证标记，可能无法确认符合规范，所以需要更多信息或失败？但描述是“staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun”。没有开始工作。组件条件未标记，但包装密封，只是看不到标记。这可能是needs_more_info，因为安装前必须验证标记。根据NEC 410，灯具安装需要符合列表和标签。如果无法验证，应该需要更多信息。风险可能是中等或高。工作阶段是staged。组件条件可能包括“non-compliant”？因为看不到标记，可能不符合。但描述没说任何缺陷，只是证据没有显现。可能更安全的是needs_more_info。

决策：needs_more_info。风险：medium？如果安装了错误的灯具可能导致火灾，风险medium或high。工作阶段staged。组件条件：空，因为未安装，也没有缺陷。percent_complete：0（还未开始）。value：0。sound_source等不需要。confidence：0.9？rationale：需要验证标记以确保符合图纸和规范。references: ["NEC 410.6", "NEC 110.3(B)"]等。

我们需要生成一个JSON。注意不要加任何外面东西。所以直接输出JSON。

让我们组装：
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Fixture packaging sealed with rating side not visible; cannot verify required size/class per drawing"],
  "actions": ["Inspect packaging for required marking or provide documentation showing compliance"],
  "rationale": "NEC 410 requires luminaires to be listed and labeled; without visible rating, compliance to drawing cannot be confirmed. Installation must not proceed until marking is verified.",
  "references": ["NEC 410.6", "NEC 110.3(B)"]
}
确保所有字段存在。confidence浮点数。risk小写。输出JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Fixture packaging sealed with rating side not visible; cannot verify required size/class per drawing"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Inspect packaging for required marking or provide documentation showing compliance"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 410 requires luminaires to be listed and labeled; without visible rating, compliance to drawing cannot be confirmed. Installation must not proceed until marking is verified.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.6",
    "NEC 110.3(B)"
  ]
}
